interpretation_summary: exact tier: 37.5% of ops / 27% of whole tasks; 87% of tasks have a structural skeleton; median task (60%) is mixed and needs both tiers. The structural slice is disproportionately the reference-propagating (rename/reorder/delete-with-refs) edits where the status quo silently corrupts.
